page: Microsoft Azure M128bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8473C processor operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or built-in GPUs, but it is premium storage capable and designed for block storage performance.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, with read-only small block cached speeds and large block uncached write speeds ranking in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-threaded operations are highly efficient, as demonstrated by top-tier scores in bzip3 decompression, PassMark CPU extended instructions, and PassMark encryption tests. Database operations and Redis SET operations also achieve top-tier throughput, alongside high static web serving throughput. Single-core performance is average, but the massive core count drives strong multi-core and software compilation results.

This server is engineered for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale database operations, and high-throughput web serving. The inclusion of Intel Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) supports accelerated mathematical and cryptographic operations, making it highly capable for CPU-based LLM inference. However, the lack of local storage requires reliance on external block storage, which is a key architectural tradeoff to consider during deployment.
description: Microsoft Azure M128bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a 128-vCPU Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Featuring 1024.0 GB of RAM, this server provides a high-density memory profile of 8.0 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and dedicated GPUs. Benchmark data highlights top-tier memory bandwidth, multi-threaded decompression, and database operations, alongside strong performance in CPU-based LLM inference and software compilation. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and AMX for cryptographic and vector calculations. This configuration is highly suited for memory-intensive databases, enterprise web serving, and complex multi-threaded workloads that rely on external block storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128bs_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB of RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8473C processor, designed for high-throughput database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M128bs_v3 is a memory-optimized VM with 128 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon CPU, built for enterprise database workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring one hundred twenty-eight vCPUs and one terabyte of RAM for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor at 4.0 GHz
1024.0 GB of RAM delivering top-tier memory bandwidth performance
Advanced instruction support including AVX-512 and Intel AMX
Optimized for external block storage with no local disk allocation
Best suited for large-scale databases, Redis deployments, and multi-threaded enterprise applications
